Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Deborah Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: M. Snow, an individual as Assignee.
Plaintiff's Witness: Calary Blue, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Gum Fah, Inc., a corporation as follows:
Damages $8,211.42
Prejudgment Interest $423.00
Treble Damages $16,422.84, for a total of $25,057.26
Plaintiff waived Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
